title: Migration On Distortion
description: Migration On Distortion is a build aimed at realism and preserving most vanilla mechanics and adding new ones
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2da41d8a74907b65be389272e524d1c6eb3068c8.png)
**M.O.D. This build is focused on realistic and varied gameplay**

**Why should you download our build?(Modpack)**
1. The assembly is optimized and balanced in terms of gameplay and is very interesting to play (especially with friends)
2. The assembly contains mods that make everyday activities easier
3. There is room for improvement

The assembly is not suitable for multi-user servers, it contains auxiliary mods that may be prohibited on other servers, but for servers with up to 8 people the assembly is fun to play

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wwxxXVkAuPY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**FAQ**

If the game doesn't launch me or the mods conflictand if I want to add my mods - https://app.gitbook.com/o/DiPGMbBEoNKVrFSaUoTn/s/DZPNgxqIQ7nuVoHtzu8h 

Something broke? - https://app.gitbook.com/o/DiPGMbBEoNKVrFSaUoTn/s/DZPNgxqIQ7nuVoHtzu8h/something-broke

<details>
<summary>English</summary>
  
The assembly contains mods that change the behavior of the camera
Do a Barrel Roll and Camera Overhaul Reforged
___

This assembly also contains Delight series mods

___
<details>
<summary>What awaits you?</summary>

New structures
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc128b8202c9f0e87a2cd2d0239b8ba75eb74ab2.jpeg)

New mobs
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56afc83d10a1646825943e3035164588dec74671.jpeg)

New villages
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fd1a575565f2eace0bd6365d4a8f6e8668e9a72.jpeg)

Seasons
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/196215ab7fed547fd66dfdced00e7c35195d8a6d.jpeg)

New scenic views
![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7dcf059b21ee555cd14a85424177633be658892.jpeg)

</details>


Next we updated the combat and animations, for this we used Fresh moves and Better Combat
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_csx7T1-u1k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

___

Also in the assembly there are mechanics of thirst, temperature and somersault, which will diversify the game and set new goals for the player.
![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9073c3171f330bd25b99e0fc57382d4ad57633df.png)

___

There is a mod for playing on a server that will allow you to raise a participant when he dies

___
The assembly has 400+ modifications and the assembly will be expanded, optimized and switched to new versions

</details>



<details>
<summary>Русский</summary>

В сборке присутствуют моды изменяющие поведение камеры.
Do a Barrel Roll и Camera Overhaul Reforged

___

В данной сборке также присутствуют моды серии Delight

___

<details>
<summary>Что вас ждет?</summary>

Новые структуры
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc128b8202c9f0e87a2cd2d0239b8ba75eb74ab2.jpeg)

Новые мобы
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56afc83d10a1646825943e3035164588dec74671.jpeg)

Новые деревни
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fd1a575565f2eace0bd6365d4a8f6e8668e9a72.jpeg)

Сезоны
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/196215ab7fed547fd66dfdced00e7c35195d8a6d.jpeg)

Красивые виды
![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7dcf059b21ee555cd14a85424177633be658892.jpeg)

</details>

Далее мы обновили бой и анимацию, для этого использовали Fresh Moves и Better Combat.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_csx7T1-u1k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

___

Также в сборке есть механики жажды, темпиратуры и кувырка что разнообразит игру и поставит перед игроком новые цели.
![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9073c3171f330bd25b99e0fc57382d4ad57633df.png)

___

Есть мод для игры на сервере который позволит поднять участника при его смерти

___

В сборке 400+ модификаций и сборка будет расширяться, оптимизироваться и переходить на новые версии.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Türkiye</summary>

Montaj, kameranın davranışını değiştiren modlar içerir.
Do a Barrel Roll/Camera Overhaul Reforged

___

Bu derleme aynı zamanda Delight serisi modlarını da içerir

___

<details>
<summary>Seni neler bekliyor?</summary>

Yeni yapılar
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc128b8202c9f0e87a2cd2d0239b8ba75eb74ab2.jpeg)

Yeni çetelerin
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56afc83d10a1646825943e3035164588dec74671.jpeg)

Yeni köyler
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fd1a575565f2eace0bd6365d4a8f6e8668e9a72.jpeg)

Mevsimler
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/196215ab7fed547fd66dfdced00e7c35195d8a6d.jpeg)

Güzel manzaralar
![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7dcf059b21ee555cd14a85424177633be658892.jpeg)

</details>


Daha sonra dövüşü ve animasyonu güncelledik, bunun için Fresh Moves ve Better Combat.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_csx7T1-u1k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

___

Ayrıca montajda oyunu çeşitlendirecek ve oyuncu için yeni hedefler belirleyecek susuzluk, sıcaklık ve takla mekaniği var.
![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9073c3171f330bd25b99e0fc57382d4ad57633df.png)

___

Bir sunucuda, bir katılımcı öldüğünde onu yükseltmenize izin verecek bir oyun modu var

___

Montajda 400'den fazla değişiklik mevcut olup montaj genişletilecek, optimize edilecek ve yeni versiyonlara geçilecektir.

</details>



<details>
<summary>中國人</summary>

此程式集包含更改相機行為的模組。
Do a Barrel Roll/Camera Overhaul Reforged

___

該元件還包含 Delight 系列模組。

___

<details>
<summary>什麼在等著你？</summary>

新結構
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc128b8202c9f0e87a2cd2d0239b8ba75eb74ab2.jpeg)

新的小怪
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56afc83d10a1646825943e3035164588dec74671.jpeg)

新村
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fd1a575565f2eace0bd6365d4a8f6e8668e9a72.jpeg)

季節
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/196215ab7fed547fd66dfdced00e7c35195d8a6d.jpeg)

美麗的景色
![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7dcf059b21ee555cd14a85424177633be658892.jpeg)

</details>

接下來，我們更新了戰鬥和動畫，為此我們使用了 Fresh Moves 和 Better Combat。
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_csx7T1-u1k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

___

此外，在組裝中還有口渴、溫度和翻筋斗的機制，這將使遊戲多樣化並為玩家設定新的目標。
![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9073c3171f330bd25b99e0fc57382d4ad57633df.png)

___

有一個在伺服器上玩的模組，可以讓你在玩家死後復活他

___

程序集有400多項修改，並且組件將被擴展、最佳化並切換到新版本。

</details>

___

Translations may be incorrect (Google Translate)
